title: The Alliance Says Farewell to Wano
description: On pages 17–19, this part focuses on Unknown person #16, Unknown person #17, Unknown person #18 as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Whoa Whoa Whoa! Are you going to...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: No!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can't seriously mean to use that side of Mu77on!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even you have to know that red Ram mutton isn't like any other meat!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As sheep grow from Lambs into mature Rams...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...the flavor of their meat grows stronger. It gets Quirkier too.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If that wasn't bad enough, red rams have a unique trait that makes their meat even harder to handle!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When they reach one year of age, they go through a gigantic growth spurt...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Rmbl RMBL RMBL

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...they develop a layer of body fat that's as hard as armor!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way a scrawny runt like you can butcher that carcass!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: A runt like him?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As if you could do it either, Patty.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: FEH! Same goes for you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's only one man on this ship who can...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: ...and that's head chef Zeff.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: CARTE.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: carry this to the table for me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Didn't you hear me? You can't...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do it! I don't want to leave the customer waiting a second longer than needed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Please!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: O-okay, okay.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: It's okay.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: I've got this.

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 25 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
